title: 6 Pack A6481 A6485 Thread Spool for Black Decker Strimmer STC1820CM STC1820PC STC1820EPC STC1840EPC ST5530 ST1823 GLC1823L20 (6 Pack + 1 Copertura + 1 Molar la)
features: Pack of 6 trimmer replacement spool for Black Decker: GL280 / GL301 / GL340 / GL425 / GL430 / GL530 / GL540 / GL545 / GL555 / GL560 / GL570/ GL850/ GLC13 / GLC120. GLC2 000 / GLC2500 / GLC2500L / GLC3000 /GL4525 / GL4525SB / GL5028 / GL5028SB / GLC1423L / GLC1825N / GLC1825L / GLC3630L / STC11. 820 / STC1815 / ST4525 / ST5530 / STC1820PC/EPC / STC1840/EPC / ST1823
Optimized for extremely high performance and load

Good quality: the 10m trimmer line allows for a larger grass cutting area with a diameter of 1.5 mm. The black axle and decker thread spool is made of improved nylon amide material. It is more durable than other products and a longer service life

Fast cutting: auto feed system changes the thread spool grass trimmer to facilitate tedious jobs than manual winding shafts. It uses centrifugal and aerodynamics to reduce resistance and achieve fast and clear cutting.

Easy to install: you can replace it quickly and easily with buckle without tools. 6 black + decker thread spool achieve free replacement and ensure long-term use. Package contains 6 packs of AF100 thread spool 1.5 mm 10 m/pieces, 1 x cap, 1 x feather.

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Take the standard precautions when using power tools, such as wearing safety glasses and gloves, avoid contact with the cutting rope, keep hands and other body parts away from the cutting area, and be careful of flying debris. Please read and follow the instructions included (English language not guaranteed).
